finalized_plan.description: Use a web search to locate the definitive, full-text, searchable version of Valentina Re’s contribution in the 2017 book "World Building: Transmedia, Fans, Industries." Identify a reliable source, such as from OAPEN or a similar repository
Once the correct PDF is identified (e.g., via the library.oapen.org link), use the "inspect_file_as_text" tool on that file to load its content as markdown text
Search within the loaded text using keywords like "metalepsis", "dream", "reality", and related synonyms to pinpoint the specific section discussing metalepsis between a dream world and reality

Locate the sentence or paragraph where the horror movie is cited as having popularized the concept. Pay close attention to the exact formatting of the movie’s title, including any articles (e.g., "The")
Extract the complete title of the horror movie along with surrounding contextual sentences that support its identification
Verify that the extracted passage clearly ties the movie to the discussed concept and matches the requirements from the task
Compile the findings into the required final answer format, including a short outcome summary, an extremely detailed explanation with extracted context, and additional context if applicable

root_cause_reasoning: The agent failed to visit the book's webpage
